case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. KATRENAK, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 5 JUDGE: JOHN J. CONWAY CLERK: M.MELVIN REPORTER: V.GROSS COUNSEL OF RECORD: FOR PLAINTIFF SIDNEY BERENSTEIN, ESQ. DEFENDANT SAL MARROQUIN. DEFENDANT WILLIAM KATRENAK NOT PRESENT. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD IN CHAMBERS; MATTER SETTLED AND STATED FOR THE RECORD. DEFENDANT MARROQUIN REPRESENTS THAT HE HAS POWER OF ATTORNEY ON BEHALF OF WILLIAM KATRENAK; CONCURS WITH SETTLEMENT AS STATED. STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT TO BE PREPARED.
